name: Voyager — PostgreSQL → YugabyteDB live migration
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client pv && { test -x /usr/bin/docker || test -x /usr/local/bin/docker || { ARCH=$(uname -m) && sudo curl -fsSL "https://download.docker.com/linux/static/stable/${ARCH}/docker-24.0.7.tgz" | sudo tar xz -C /usr/local/bin --strip-components=1 docker/docker; }; } && curl -ssLo init-voyager-postgres/pscript https://raw.githubusercontent.com/paxtonhare/demo-magic/master/demo-magic.sh && chmod +x init-voyager-postgres/pscript init-voyager-postgres/prompt.sh init-voyager-postgres/prompt-import.sh init-voyager-postgres/prompt-wa.sh init-voyager-postgres/pre-step.sh && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && sudo install -m 755 .devcontainer/scripts/yb-voyager-wrapper.sh /usr/local/bin/yb-voyager && docker-compose -f init-voyager-postgres/compose.yml pull && mkdir -p /workspaces/ybdb-vanguard/voyager-data /workspaces/ybdb-vanguard/ybdb/backup && echo "✅ PostgreSQL Voyager exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && docker-compose -f init-voyager-postgres/compose.yml up -d && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → psql                (PostgreSQL source shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-export   (Voyager export shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-import   (Voyager import shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-wa       (Voyager cutover shell)"'
